queries.question: Who reported the results of the US elections?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    j.name AS journalist_name
FROM 
    stories s 
JOIN 
    journalists j ON s.journalist_id = j.id
WHERE
    s.title = 'US Election Results'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?s a :Stories .
  ?j a :Journalists .
  ?s p:hasjournalists ?j .
  ?j p:name ?name .
  ?s p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "US Election Results")
}

queries.question: Who reported the results of the US elections?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    j.name AS news_agency_name
FROM 
    stories s 
JOIN 
    news_agencies j ON s.news_agency_id = j.id
WHERE
    s.title = 'US Election Results'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?s a :Stories .
  ?j a :News_Agency .
  ?s p:hasnews_agencies ?j .
  ?j p:name ?name .
  ?s p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "US Election Results")
}

queries.question: Who reported the results of the US elections?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    j.name AS journalist_name, na.name AS news_agency_name
FROM 
    stories s 
JOIN 
    journalists j ON s.journalist_id = j.id  JOIN news_agencies na ON s.news_agency_id = na.id
WHERE
    s.title = 'US Election Results'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?s a :Stories .
  ?j a :Journalists .
  ?s p:hasjournalists ?j .
  ?na a :News_Agency .
  ?s p:hasnews_agencies ?na .
  ?j p:name ?name .
  ?na p:name ?name2 .
  ?s p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "US Election Results")
}

queries.question: Who reported what story?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    j.name AS journalist_name,
    s.title AS story_title
FROM 
    stories s 
JOIN 
    journalists j ON s.journalist_id = j.id;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?s a :Stories .
  ?j a :Journalists .
  ?s p:hasjournalists ?j .
  ?j p:name ?name .
  ?s p:title ?title .
}

queries.question: Who reported what story?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    j.name, na.name,
    s.title AS story_title
FROM 
    stories s 
JOIN 
    journalists j ON s.journalist_id = j.id JOIN news_agencies na ON s.news_agency_id = na.id;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?title WHERE {
  ?s a :Stories .
  ?j a :Journalists .
  ?s p:hasjournalists ?j .
  ?na a :News_Agency .
  ?s p:hasnews_agencies ?na .
  ?j p:name ?name .
  ?na p:name ?name2 .
  ?s p:title ?title .
}
